sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: Look to your covenant, O Lord, and forget not the life of your poor ones for ever. Arise, O God, and defend our cause, and forget not the cries of those who seek you.

sections.author: Francesca LaRosa
sections.snippet: Blessed the people the Lord has chosen to be his own.

sections.author: SP2025
sections.snippet: Stay awake and be ready! For you do not know on what day your Lord will come.

sections.title: Rain Down
sections.author: Jaime Cortez
sections.snippet: Rain down, rain down, rain down your love on your people. Rain down, rain down, rain down your love, God of life.

sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: O Jerusalem, glorify the Lord, Who gives you your fill of finest wheat.

sections.title: Taste and See
sections.author: Steve Angrisano
sections.snippet: Taste and see the goodness of the Lord, the goodness of the Lord. Taste and see the goodness of the Lord, the goodness of the Lord.

sections.title: Goodness of God
sections.author: Bethel Music & Jenn Johnson
sections.snippet: I love you, Lord; For your mercy never fails me. All my days, I’ve been held in your hands. From the moment that I wake up until I lay my head; Oh, I will sing of the goodness of God.

sections.title: Forever
sections.author: Chris Tomlin
sections.snippet: Give thanks to the Lord, our God and King; his love endures forever. For he is good, he is above all things; his love endures forever. Sing praise, sing praise!

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lord have mercy! Christ have mercy! Lord have mercy!

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: When we eat this breadand drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world. Grant us, grant us peace.
